implemented_and_automated: current Freedom/Paidax percentage portfolio format loads without mixing brokers
current object-based watchlist format loads and invalid watchlist does not stop portfolio parsing
portfolio age is not guessed and blocks personal investment conclusions
opinion/routine content is rejected before event creation
stable physical-event identity merges duplicate headlines and separates different event types
syndicated copies do not count as independent confirmations
thematic portfolio links require an explicit approved_portfolio_links field
missing mandatory source catalog never returns FULL coverage
Stage 3 event/config/window/snapshot/delivery state is used without stateless bypass
calendar window enforces both lower bound and cutoff/freeze upper bounds
reused frozen snapshot retains its original config versions
repository event-version changes block stale delivery
Gemini free prose is rejected; only existing source/fact references may be selected
Freedom and Paidax render as separate blocks
all accepted event IDs survive Telegram chunking
shadow delivery stops at PREPARED and never sends Telegram
installer performs the initial release gate before push and installs no workflow file
